name: io.github.nveil-ai/nveil
description: AI-powered data-processing and visualization toolkit — describe joins, aggregations, pivots, resampling, geocoding, 2D/3D charts, geospatial maps, voxel/volume rendering, and medical imaging in plain language. Planned server-side via constraint solving, executed entirely on the user's machine. Raw data never leaves; only column schema and summary statistics are sent.
title: NVEIL

environmentVariables.name: NVEIL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: NVEIL planning service API key. Obtain at https://nveil.com.
